Removed_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for players to type commands without having to click on the input field.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagEnablePreviewLimitingTPGen_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of previews generated for teleportation.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing lag when players teleport.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagFixFormatIssueOnContentAssetIds_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Fixes formatting issues with content asset IDs.
Removed_Other.purpose: Ensures assets load correctly, enhancing user experience.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagFmodLockFreeDspActive_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Implements a new audio processing method that reduces locking issues.
Removed_Other.purpose: Provides smoother audio playback and reduces lag during sound effects.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagMigrateTPGenRSL_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Migrates certain game generation processes to a new system.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves game performance and loading times for players.

Removed_Graphics.name: FFlagRenderOcclusionQueries2_Staged
Removed_Graphics.mechanism: Improves how the game engine determines which parts of the game are visible, reducing unnecessary rendering.
Removed_Graphics.purpose: Enhances game performance by making it run smoother and faster for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks the version of the codebase using a dynamic string.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers manage updates and fixes more effectively.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates how dynamic strings handle timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy of time-related information displayed to players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a quick reference to the current version of the codebase.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and features without delays.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance when displaying time-related information.

Added_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for players to invite specific friends to join them in games.
